data.title: Three Ethereum (ETH)-Based Altcoins Spring to Life After New Coinbase Listing Roadmap Additions
data.description:
The top US-based crypto exchange platform Coinbase is announcing the addition of three new Ethereum (ETH)-based altcoins to its listing roadmap, premeditating rallies..
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/21/three-ethereum-eth-based-altcoins-spring-to-life-after-new-coinbase-listing-roadmap-additions/

data.title: Solana Futures ETF Now Available To Wall Street, SOL Price To $150?
data.description:
Volatility Shares LLC is now offering Wall Street investors a Solana Futures Exchange Traded Fund (ETF). This fund, the first in the United States, is designed to service institutional and retail investors. Volatility Shares designed this product for investors interested in adopting crypto but are concerned about the associated risks.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/21/solana-futures-etf-now-available-to-wall-street-sol-price-to-150/

data.title: Tether taps Big Four firm for audit after years of infamous vagueness
data.description:
Tether is finally doing the thing it kept saying it would do for years—getting a real audit. CEO Paolo Ardoino confirmed the company is “engaging with a Big Four accounting firm,” though he didn’t say which one or when the audit would happen. He said it’s now “feasible” thanks to U.S. President Donald Trump’s crypto-friendly […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/tether-taps-big-four-firm-for-audit-after-years-of-infamous-vagueness/

data.title: Ethereum-based RWA protocol Zoth hacked second time in a month for $8.85 million
data.description:
Zoth, an Ethereum-based platform focused on tokenized real-world assets, suffered a second major security breach in less than three weeks on March 21, with attackers draining $8.85 million in digital assets. The company confirmed the breach and is working with security experts to investigate the incident. Zoth is also offering a $500,000 bounty for information […]

The post Ethereum-based RWA protocol Zoth hacked second time in a month for $8
source: https://cryptoslate.com/ethereum-based-rwa-protocol-zoth-hacked-second-time-in-a-month-for-8-85-million/

data.title: Coinbase in the process of buying Deribit for $5 billion
data.description:
Coinbase is deep in talks to buy Deribit, the largest crypto options exchange on the planet. Deribit handles more Bitcoin and Ether options than anyone else. According to a report from Bloomberg, the two companies have already contacted regulators in Dubai, where Deribit holds a license. That license would be handed over to Coinbase if […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/coinbase-in-the-process-of-buying-deribit-for-5-billion/

data.title: Cantor Fitzgerald sparks comeback in crypto lending after 2022 market wipeout
data.description:
Cantor Fitzgerald just dropped $2 billion into a new Bitcoin lending business. That move alone shoved the whole crypto lending sector out of its grave. After the 2022 collapse wiped out lenders like Celsius, BlockFi, and Genesis, most people thought the space was dead. Not anymore. Big firms are back. Big money is back. And […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/cantor-fitzgerald-comeback-in-crypto-lending/
